problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
hypothesis: If Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
